title: How a Metal Box Changed the World - Sarah Paine
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Sarah Paine on how the standardized shipping container transformed global commerce and society. The discussion explores technological disruption and systemic change driven by infrastructure innovation rather than AI.
writeup: Sarah Paine examines how the shipping container reshaped global commerce and supply chains in this conversation with Dwarkesh Patel. The discussion traces the historical, economic, and technological dimensions of containerization, framing a standardized metal box as a world-changing innovation. The central takeaway: a simple change in how goods are packed and moved restructured trade at a global scale.
